text.message: Oof just realized I’m getting plowed rip
Maybe I’ll get some pity trade lol
Honestly this game is over lol
Far too early. But you’re just talking to yourself
Brick port does nothing for oj he just made us all lose to you
blue you shouldve just played it safe and taken 6 3 11 yourself
Orange will crush once he has city. Has all the port flexibility
I’ll trade you all the ore you want
Part of the game. Maybe we can quit stealing from me as I fall to last place
It never was me. Not sure how that came across
well you got greedy by not going 9 10 11
Not at all. I wanted more brick
Now you lost the ore port
See how plowing me ruined everyone’s game lol
Red gets road and army easily
You should change your name to RunsMouthRick
Puts you on 9 with an open settle
